prompt: On the booted iOS simulator, open the Settings app, navigate to General > About, and tell me the iOS Software Version shown.
goal: Agent opened Settings, navigated to General then About, and reported a plausible iOS version (e.g. 17.x / 18.x) read from the About screen.

prompt: On the booted iOS simulator, open Settings, go to General > About, and report the device Name shown there.
goal: Agent reached Settings > General > About and reported the device name from that screen.

prompt: On the booted iOS simulator, open the Settings app and turn ON Airplane Mode.
goal: Agent opened Settings and toggled the Airplane Mode switch from off to on (a real tap on the Airplane Mode toggle), then reported it is on.

prompt: On the booted iOS simulator, open Settings, go to the Wi-Fi screen, and report whether Wi-Fi is currently on or off.
goal: Agent reached the Wi-Fi settings screen and reported its on/off state.

prompt: On the booted iOS simulator, open Settings > Display & Brightness and report whether Light or Dark appearance is currently selected.
goal: Agent reached Display & Brightness and reported the selected appearance (Light or Dark).

prompt: On the booted iOS simulator, open Settings, find the Accessibility section, and report one option listed inside it.
goal: Agent navigated to the Accessibility screen and reported at least one option listed there (e.g. VoiceOver, Zoom, Display & Text Size).

prompt: On the booted iOS simulator, open Settings, use the search field to find 'Bluetooth', and open the Bluetooth screen.
goal: Agent used the Settings search field to locate Bluetooth and opened the Bluetooth screen.

prompt: On the booted iOS simulator, open Settings, go into General > About, then navigate back to the top-level Settings list.
goal: Agent reached General > About and then returned to the root Settings screen using back navigation.
